title: mandevilla sancta-martae
intro: Mandevilla sancta-martae, also known as the White Mandevilla or the Trumpet Vine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mandevilla sancta-martae include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
